modules.name: External Adapters
modules.description: Low-level wrappers for external tools and processes: subprocess execution, Git CLI, GitHub CLI, Python runtime, and the Agent SDK interface.

modules.name: Structural Analysis
modules.description: Repository code analysis pipeline: Python-based AST parsing, raw output normalization, and the TypeScript adapter that invokes the analysis script.

modules.name: Configuration
modules.description: Configuration loading, defaults, file-based config resolution, and the CLI config merger that combines CLI args with file/default config.

modules.name: Environment Checks
modules.description: Pre-flight environment validation: detecting available languages, checking runtime dependencies (Git, Python), and verifying tree-sitter parsers.

modules.name: Metadata
modules.description: Reading, writing, and validating documentation generation metadata (timestamps, commit hashes, staleness detection).

modules.name: Prompt Builders
modules.description: LLM prompt construction for each generation stage: module clustering, module documentation, overview page, and quality review.

modules.name: Orchestration
modules.description: Core documentation generation pipeline: the main generate function, run context, output path resolution, and all pipeline stages (analysis, planning, generation, review, metadata write, module tree).

modules.name: Incremental Update
modules.description: Differential update logic: reading prior generation state and mapping changed files to affected modules for selective regeneration.

modules.name: Validation
modules.description: Post-generation documentation validation: cross-link checks, file presence, Mermaid diagram syntax, metadata shape, and module tree integrity.

modules.name: Publish
modules.description: Publishing generated documentation to a Git branch and creating a GitHub pull request, including preflight checks, branch management, and PR creation.

modules.name: CLI
modules.description: Command-line interface: command definitions, human/JSON output formatting, progress rendering, cancellation handling, and exit codes.

modules.name: Contracts and Schemas
modules.description: Zod schemas for runtime validation of data structures exchanged between pipeline stages (analysis output, configuration, generation results, metadata, planning, publish, quality review, validation).

modules.name: Type Definitions
modules.description: TypeScript type interfaces and utility types shared across the codebase: analysis, CLI, common result types, configuration, environment, generation, metadata, orchestration, planning, publish, quality review, update, and validation.

modules.name: Shared Utilities
modules.description: Small shared utilities: error message extraction, language-to-extension mapping, and the package entry point.

modules.name: Test Helpers
modules.description: Shared test infrastructure: mock Agent SDK, CLI runner, fixture paths, Git helpers, live fixture repos, publish test doubles, story-specific fixtures, and temp directory management.

modules.name: Test Fixtures
modules.description: Static fixture repositories used by tests: multi-language, no-git, and valid-TypeScript sample projects.

modules.name: Unit Tests
modules.description: Unit test suites covering analysis, CLI output/commands/progress, configuration resolution, environment checks, metadata status, orchestration stages, prompt builders, and validation.

modules.name: Integration and Live Tests
modules.description: Integration tests (determinism, end-to-end, failure modes, publish, SDK contract) and live tests that run against real infrastructure.
